features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: You gain the Channel Divinity feature.

features.name: Domain Feature
features.description: You gain a domain feature related to your chosen domain.

features.name: Cantrips
features.description: At 1st level, you know three cantrips of your choice from The list of Cantrips. You learn additional cantrips as in Cantrips Known column the table.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: You can channel divine energy to create a beneficial effect

features.name: Domain Feature (Life Domain)
features.description: You gain the Life domain feature: You have resistance to necrotic damage.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: Starting at 3rd level, you gain the Spellcasting class feature. See the cleric table in chapter 10 for details.

features.name: quotidian eloquence
features.description: The bard can now cast a spell as a bonus action at will. The spell must be on the bard spell list.

features.name: unerring accuracy
features.description: The bard's spells always hit their targets, and any spells that have an area now affect every creature in that area.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: Can use as a bonus action to deal radiant or necrotic damage

features.name: Bless盟友或Curses敌人
features.description: 盟友获得加成，敌人受到减益

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: At 2nd level, you gain the ability to channel divine energy directly from a deity. You can use this feature once per day when you finish a long rest. As you advance in levels, your Channel Divinity options grow. When you use Channel Divinity, choose one of the effects listed and then finish a short or long rest before using it again.
